ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the associated event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the session starts */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the session */,
  "in_person_venue" TEXT /* Venue for in-person attendance */,
  "virtual_link" TEXT /* Link for virtual attendance */,
  "format" TEXT /* Type of session format (e.g., presentation, interactive) */,
  "speakers" TEXT /* List of speakers for the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the session */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "current_registration" INTEGER /* Current number of registered participants */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., keynote, workshop, panel) */,
  "resources_link" TEXT /* Link to additional resources or materials */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., scheduled, canceled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* General location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or purpose of the event */,
  "organizers" TEXT /* Names of the organizers responsible for the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., conference, workshop, expo) */,
  "event_website" TEXT /* URL of the event's website */,
  "event_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the event's logo */,
  "registration_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if registration is open */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions in the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planning, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the associated event
Type of session format (e.g., presentation, interactive)
List of speakers for the session
Duration of the session in minutes
Type of session (e.g., keynote, workshop, panel)
Link to additional resources or materials
Status of the session (e.g., scheduled, canceled, completed)
Description or purpose of the event
Names of the organizers responsible for the event
Type of event (e.g., conference, workshop, expo)
URL or path to the event's logo
Total number of sessions in the event
Status of the event (e.g., planning, active, completed)
